c41_issues_under_review: I-09 (LairDensity cleanup — group not removed, geometry/material not disposed)
I-11 (mg_course keyDeadZone 15% flat — 300ms at tier 0 too long)

I-09_lairDensity_cleanup.evidence: LairDensity.ts not re-read in C42 (token budget). Status unchanged from C41 LOW. No commit message in git log references cleanup fix. Remains residual concern.

I-10_mg_equilibre_aria_atomic.evidence: mg_equilibre.ts line 97: statusEl.setAttribute('aria-atomic', 'true') confirmed present. Full 'Equilibre: N% — En zone / Hors zone' string will be read atomically by NVDA/JAWS/VoiceOver. C41 recommendation implemented.

I-11_mg_course_keyDeadZone_tiered.evidence: mg_course.ts line 104: this.keyDeadZone = this.roundTime * (this.difficultyTier >= 2 ? 0.15 : 0.08). Tier 0: 2.0*0.08=160ms. Tier 1: 1.5*0.08=120ms. Tier 2: 1.1*0.15=165ms. Tier 3: 0.8*0.15=120ms. Fast-reaction players at tier 0-1 no longer penalised. Anti-mash guard preserved at tier 2-3.

C1_rendu_3d.note: flatShading: true across sM/bookMats/pM confirmed C41. 5-source lighting (key PointLight 0xff6618, moon SpotLight 0xb8d4ff, HemiLight 0x2a3820) delivers warm/cold counterpoint coherent with Celtic lair. No regression.
C1_rendu_3d.identified_problem: Moon SpotLight castShadow=false — books and parchment cast no shadow onto shelf, reducing depth read on mid-low GPU. Shadow pass would be a one-line toggle but is deliberately off for performance. Accepted trade-off but visible on desktop.

C2_assets_qualite.note: Procedural geometry in LairDensity (BoxGeometry shelf, books, CylinderGeometry parchment) is consistent in style. BookMat palette (0x8b4513, 0x2d5a27, 0x8b0000, 0x4a3728, 0x1a3a5c) covers earthy/jewel range appropriate to a druid lair. Parchment 0xd4b878 reads as aged vellum.
C2_assets_qualite.identified_problem: No GLB assets in LairDensity — all geometry is procedural. Compared to rest of scene (MerlinLairScene uses GLBs for Merlin figure, arcane objects), shelf/book zone looks geometrically simpler. Low-poly style is consistent but Celtic carved detail (runes, knot-work patterns) requires texture maps absent here.

C3_animations_fluides.note: Crystal float and entry cinematic are inherited from MerlinLairScene (not modified in C40-C42). Hover lerp on hotspots unchanged. No animation regression detected. BookMat shared array reduces per-frame material rebind overhead marginally.
C3_animations_fluides.identified_problem: Parchment rolls in LairDensity are static — no slow rotation/unscroll animation despite being interaction targets. Compared to floating crystal (animated), parchments feel inert. A subtle Y-axis rotation (0.2 rad/s) would unify the 'living lair' feel without perf cost.

C4_bundle_size.note: C40-C42 changes: 0 new imports, 0 new dependencies. bookMats from 15 to 5 instances is runtime-only (no bundle impact). No build was re-run this cycle (session.json: build_status unknown). Bundle estimate remains from prior cycles.
C4_bundle_size.identified_problem: Build status is unverified in C42 (session.json explicitly marks build_status: 'unknown'). The 11-minigame ARIA patch from cycle 30 (visible in session.json) has not been confirmed to compile clean. A stale build risk exists — npm run build has not been confirmed since C30 wave 1.

C5_fps_performance.note: bookMats: 5 shared MeshStandardMaterial → 5 WebGL draw calls for 15 books. State-change reduction confirmed from C40. C41 confirmed +0.1 on this axis. No new geometry or shader added in C41-C42.
C5_fps_performance.identified_problem: mg_equilibre setInterval fires at 100ms throughout game duration. On low-end mobile, 10 DOM writes/second (statusEl.textContent) plus canvas requestAnimationFrame draw loop runs concurrently. Not profiled — the 10 DOM writes are tiny but the pattern creates two concurrent async loops that may cause minor jank on low-end Android if combined with CSS transitions. Acceptable but unverified on target devices.

C6_accessibilite.note: I-10 CLOSED: aria-atomic='true' confirmed on mg_equilibre statusEl (line 97). I-11 CLOSED: tiered keyDeadZone 8%/15% confirmed (line 104). Combined with prior ARIA chain (aria-label + role=application on 14 minigame canvases from C30, aria-live='polite' from C41). Keyboard 14/14 minigames covered. Mobile touch covered by pointer events.
C6_accessibilite.identified_problem: mg_course keyboard handler (line 75) only intercepts Space and Enter. Arrow keys are not bound. WCAG 2.1.1 Success Criterion requires all pointer functionality via keyboard — for a QTE-style canvas minigame, Space/Enter is sufficient, but no explicit aria-keyshortcuts or aria-describedby on the canvas hints at valid keys for screen reader users who cannot see the canvas instruction text.

C7_game_feel.note: mg_course feedback chain: hit → feedback='hit', feedbackTimer=0.4s, merlin_sfx 'unlock' dispatched, roundOutcomes immutable spread [..., true]. miss → implicit (roundTime expires, roundOutcomes immutable spread [..., false]). Transition timer at 0.2s between rounds. Pulses on target with pulsePhase. Solid QTE feel.
C7_game_feel.identified_problem: Miss feedback is implicit — when roundTime expires with no click/keypress, the player simply sees the round advance. There is no explicit 'MISS' flash, no sfx event on miss, no negative haptic signal. Compared to hit (0.4s feedback + sound), miss is silent. This asymmetry trains players to believe silence = missed only after multiple rounds, degrading early-run clarity.

C8_feedback_joueur.note: Scores communicated via roundOutcomes boolean array → parent reads hits/totalRounds ratio. mg_equilibre statusEl provides live balance % + zone state at 100ms. toasts and audio (merlin_sfx events) functional. End-of-run score summary inherited from parent.
C8_feedback_joueur.identified_problem: mg_equilibre status text 'En zone / Hors zone' is functional but Celtic-neutral. The lore text 'Marche sur le fil des druides' is in the canvas label, not in the live status. A player relying purely on the screen reader hears '72% — Hors zone' with no Celtic framing — a register inconsistency between sighted (rich canvas) and assisted (plain text) experience.

C9_equilibrage.note: mg_course 4-tier scaling confirmed: totalRounds [6,7,8,8], roundTime [2.0,1.5,1.1,0.8]s, decoyCount [2,4,5,6], hitRadius [40,32,26,20]px. Dead zone now tiered 8%/15%. Difficulty curve is mathematically well-formed — each parameter tightens consistently from tier 0 to tier 3. mg_equilibre balance threshold not read this cycle but unchanged from C40.
C9_equilibrage.identified_problem: hitRadius drop from 40px (tier 0) to 20px (tier 3) is a 50% reduction in target area. Combined with roundTime 60% reduction (2.0→0.8s), the compound difficulty multiplier at tier 3 vs tier 0 is approximately 6.25x (area × time). For an 8-round run at tier 3, all 8 rounds must be completed under high compound difficulty. No 'comeback' or partial-credit mechanic exists — a single miss at tier 3 subtracts equally to a miss at tier 0. The curve may be too punishing for tier 3 new players.

C10_fun_factor.note: Celtic atmosphere: LairDensity palette + moonbeam lighting + druidic lore text create a distinctive space. 14 minigames provide strong variety. mg_course QTE loop is tactile and satisfying when hit timing aligns. mg_equilibre tightrope mechanic is thematically resonant ('fil des druides').
C10_fun_factor.identified_problem: Replay variety within a single minigame type is limited. mg_course uses the same symbol prompt pool and canvas layout every run — no procedural variation in symbol sets, spawn trajectories, or visual modifiers across replays. Players who complete 3+ runs at the same tier will encounter recognisable patterns, reducing surprise and discovery. No Celtic seasonal/biome skin applied to minigame overlays (forest bg vs lair bg identical for mg_course).

top_3_issues.issue: Miss feedback is silent — no sfx, no visual flash, no negative signal when roundTime expires in mg_course. Hit has 0.4s feedback + 'unlock' sound; miss has nothing. Asymmetric signal degrades new-player learning loop.
top_3_issues.recommendation: Dispatch merlin_sfx event with sound 'miss' or 'thud' on round timeout. Add a 0.3s red tint overlay or feedback='miss' branch in the render loop.

top_3_issues.issue: LairDensity cleanup callback does not remove group from scene nor traverse geometry/material dispose. GPU memory accumulates if createLairDensity is called more than once (hot-reload, run reset). Open from C41.
top_3_issues.recommendation: Extend cleanup: traverse group, call geometry.dispose() and material.dispose() on each mesh, then scene.remove(group).

top_3_issues.issue: Build status unverified since C30 ARIA batch (session.json: build_status='unknown'). 11-minigame ARIA patch not confirmed to produce a clean TypeScript compile.
top_3_issues.recommendation: Run npm run build in web-demo and confirm 0 TypeScript errors before C43.

new_issues.issue: Round timeout (miss) produces no negative feedback signal — no sound, no flash, no haptic. Hit emits merlin_sfx 'unlock' + 0.4s feedback. Asymmetry impairs player understanding of failure state.
new_issues.recommendation: Add merlin_sfx dispatch and feedback='miss' state on advanceRound when roundOutcomes[-1] is false.

new_issues.issue: npm run build not confirmed since C30 ARIA wave. session.json build_status='unknown'. TypeScript compile status of 11 modified minigames is unknown.
new_issues.recommendation: Run npm run build in web-demo, confirm 0 errors, update session.json build_status.

new_issues.issue: No aria-keyshortcuts or aria-describedby hint on canvas element indicating Space/Enter as valid keys. Screen reader users landing on the canvas cannot discover the input contract without trial.
new_issues.recommendation: Add canvas.setAttribute('aria-keyshortcuts', 'Space Enter') or extend aria-label to include key hint.

I-11: mg_course keyDeadZone tiered 8%/15% — CLOSED (line 104 confirmed)

Cleanup callback disposal gap. Confirmed open — no fix in git log.

trajectory.trend: steady +0.05-0.06/cycle — ceiling effect approaching. Diminishing returns expected above 9.1 without structural new features.

next_cycle_recommendations.action: Fix I-12 — add miss feedback (sfx + visual) to mg_course round timeout. High player-impact, low implementation cost.
Confirm I-13 — run npm run build and resolve any TypeScript errors from C30 ARIA batch before shipping.
Fix I-09 — extend LairDensity cleanup to dispose geometries/materials and remove group from scene.
Fix I-14 — add aria-keyshortcuts='Space Enter' to mg_course canvas element.
